example_queries.title: Find high-risk transactions
example_queries.description: Identify transactions with elevated fraud scores for review

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.fraudScore > 0.7 ORDER BY c.fraudScore DESC

example_queries.title: Search large withdrawals
example_queries.description: Find withdrawal transactions over $10,000 for compliance monitoring

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.transactionType = 'Withdrawal' AND c.amount > 10000

example_queries.title: Query international transactions
example_queries.description: List all cross-border transactions for foreign exchange analysis

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.isInternational = true

example_queries.expected_use_case: International transaction monitoring and fee optimization

example_queries.title: Find account activity
example_queries.description: Retrieve transaction history for specific account

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.accountId = 'ACC-789012' ORDER BY c.timestamp DESC

example_queries.title: Semantic search for travel expenses
example_queries.description: Find travel-related transactions using AI understanding

parameters.search_text: hotel airline flight accommodation travel vacation

example_queries.expected_use_case: Expense categorization and travel rewards programs

example_queries.title: Query by merchant category
example_queries.description: Analyze all restaurant transactions for spending insights
example_queries.expected_use_case: Spending pattern analysis and budget recommendations

example_queries.title: Find declined transactions
example_queries.description: Identify failed transactions for customer outreach
example_queries.expected_use_case: Payment failure analysis and customer support

example_queries.title: AI financial advice
example_queries.description: Generate personalized savings recommendations based on spending patterns

messages.content: You are a financial advisor assistant providing spending insights.
A customer spends $800/month on restaurants and $300 on entertainment. Suggest 3 budget optimization tips.

example_queries.expected_use_case: Personal financial management and advisory services

example_queries.title: Query recent deposits
example_queries.description: Find all deposits in the last 30 days for cash flow analysis

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.transactionType = 'Deposit' AND c.timestamp >= '2025-12-06' ORDER BY c.timestamp DESC

example_queries.expected_use_case: Cash flow management and income verification

example_queries.title: Search by merchant name
example_queries.description: Find all transactions with specific merchant (e.g., Amazon)
